basic_encounters.title: A Stranger Approaches
basic_encounters.text: A wandering cultivator blocks your path. Their aura is sharp, but not overwhelming. They ask for a spar—just one exchange.

choices.label: Accept and test their strength
choices.successText: You parry cleanly and force them back. They laugh and toss you a pill before leaving.
choices.failureText: Their strike rattles your bones. You retreat with bruises and a lesson learned.

choices.label: Decline politely and offer tea instead
choices.successText: They accept. You trade insights and part on good terms.
choices.failureText: They scoff and leave, unimpressed. Still, you avoided trouble.

choices.label: Try to intimidate them with your aura
choices.successText: Your Qi flares. They nod in respect and step aside.
choices.failureText: Your aura falters. They smirk, and your confidence takes a hit.

basic_encounters.title: Fork in the Mountain Path
basic_encounters.text: Two trails split ahead. The left is steep and quiet. The right is wider with distant voices.

choices.label: Take the steep, quiet path
choices.successText: You find a calm ledge and meditate. Your mind sharpens.
choices.failureText: A loose rock sends you sliding. You recover, shaken.

choices.label: Take the wide path and blend in
choices.successText: Travelers share food and rumors. You gain useful information.
choices.failureText: A pickpocket nicks your pouch. You notice too late.

choices.label: Leap across the ravine to save time
choices.successText: You land perfectly. Your legs feel stronger.
choices.failureText: You barely make it and scrape yourself badly.

basic_encounters.title: A Flickering Spirit Lantern
basic_encounters.text: An abandoned lantern glows with pale flame. It hums when you get close, like it recognizes your presence.

choices.label: Channel Qi into the lantern
choices.successText: The flame steadies and pours warmth into your meridians.
choices.failureText: The lantern spits cold fire, draining you.

choices.label: Cleanse it with steady breathing
choices.successText: Your calm disperses the lingering resentment. The lantern dims peacefully.
choices.failureText: The resentment clings. You feel uneasy for a while.

choices.label: Leave it alone
choices.successText: You pass without incident. Caution has its own reward.
choices.failureText: Nothing happens. Still, you wonder what you missed.

basic_encounters.title: Bandits on the Road
basic_encounters.text: Three bandits step out from behind a boulder. Their leader points a blade at you and demands supplies.

choices.label: Fight
choices.successText: You break their formation and they flee.
choices.failureText: You get surrounded and take a beating before escaping.

choices.label: Talk your way out
choices.successText: You offer a few coins and a story. They let you go.
choices.failureText: They laugh and still take what they want.

choices.label: Release a pressure of Qi and walk through
choices.successText: Your aura cracks the ground. They stumble away, terrified.
choices.failureText: Your Qi sputters. They rush you while you're exposed.

basic_encounters.title: A Discarded Blade
basic_encounters.text: In the undergrowth you spot something metallic—a short blade, worn and rusted but still solid. It looks like it was dropped long ago.

choices.label: Take the blade
choices.successText: You free the dagger from the vines and slip it into your belt. It's nothing fancy, but it'll do.
choices.failureText: The blade catches on a root; you cut your hand and leave it behind.

choices.label: Leave it alone
choices.successText: You walk on. Taking what isn't yours brings no honor.
choices.failureText: You hesitate, then move on. The blade stays in the dirt.

basic_encounters.title: The Hidden Stone Tablet
basic_encounters.text: Behind a waterfall you discover a stone tablet carved with ancient cultivation markings. It radiates calm power.

choices.label: Study the markings carefully
choices.successText: The patterns click into place in your mind. Your foundation stabilizes permanently.
choices.failureText: The inscriptions blur and you gain nothing, but you avoid any lasting harm.

choices.label: Channel Qi into the tablet
choices.successText: The tablet hums and your meridians widen. You can hold more Qi than before.
choices.failureText: The tablet rejects your Qi, leaving you momentarily drained.

choices.label: Copy the markings and leave
choices.successText: You take only knowledge, not power. Still, the act feels auspicious.
choices.failureText: You waste time and the ink runs, but you keep your distance from danger.

basic_encounters.title: Heavenly Lotus Pond
basic_encounters.text: A small pond glows under moonlight. At its center floats a single lotus with petals like jade. The air smells of life.

choices.label: Eat a lotus petal
choices.successText: Warmth spreads through your limbs. Your body becomes tougher—permanently.
choices.failureText: Your stomach turns. You spit it out and feel weak for a while.

choices.label: Meditate by the pond
choices.successText: Your breathing matches the pond's rhythm. Your spirit capacity expands permanently.
choices.failureText: Mosquitoes ruin your focus. You leave irritated but intact.

choices.label: Offer respect and take only water
choices.successText: You collect a vial of glowing water. Fortune smiles on restraint.
choices.failureText: The water dulls as you scoop it. Still, you caused no offense.

encounters.title: Elder's Breathing Lesson
encounters.text: A village elder notices you and offers to teach you a basic breathing technique. "Steady breath steadies the body. Sit with me a moment."

choices.label: Sit and follow their guidance
choices.successText: You find a calm rhythm. The elder nods. "You have the foundation. Practice it whenever you rest—it will serve you well."
choices.failureText: Your mind wanders, but the elder still shares the basics. "Keep practicing. It will come."

encounters.title: First Gate: The Outer Disciple
encounters.text: At the sect gate, an outer disciple bars your way. "Prove your worth," they say. "One exchange—show me your foundation."

choices.label: Strike with controlled force
choices.successText: Your blow is clean. The disciple nods and steps aside.
choices.failureText: You overextend; they deflect easily. Still, you learn.

choices.label: Channel Qi into your palm
choices.successText: Your Qi flares steadily. They approve.
choices.failureText: Your Qi wavers. They shake their head but let you pass.

choices.label: Bow and ask for guidance
choices.successText: Your calm impresses them. They offer a tip before the next trial.
choices.failureText: They find you lacking in spirit. You press on anyway.

encounters.title: Second Gate: The Inner Disciple
encounters.text: An inner disciple stands at the second gate. "The first was a warm-up. Here we test your limits."

choices.label: Fight with everything you have
choices.successText: You push through. Your body burns but holds.
choices.failureText: They overwhelm you. You stagger but remain standing.

choices.label: Match their Qi pressure
choices.successText: Your meridians strain but hold. They respect your resolve.
choices.failureText: Your Qi buckles. You recover, humbled.

choices.label: Steady your mind and endure
choices.successText: Your spirit does not break. They step aside.
choices.failureText: The pressure cracks your focus. You breathe and continue.

encounters.title: Third Gate: The Trial Master
encounters.text: The Trial Master blocks the final gate. "Few reach me. Prove you deserve to enter the sect." Their aura is formidable.

choices.label: Unleash your full power
choices.successText: Against the odds, you land a telling blow. The Master smiles. "Welcome."
choices.failureText: You are thrown back. The Master helps you up. "You have heart. Enter."

choices.label: Merge Qi and spirit in one strike
choices.successText: Your strike carries both force and intent. The Master nods. "Well done."
choices.failureText: You falter at the last moment. "You are not ready for that technique—but you may enter."

choices.label: Accept the trial and endure
choices.successText: Your spirit holds under their pressure. "You have the will. Enter the sect."
choices.failureText: You collapse to one knee, then rise. "Pass. Barely."

encounters.title: The Hermit's Silence
encounters.text: In the glade you find an old cultivator sitting under a tree. They do not speak, but their eyes invite you to sit. The air is still; even the birds are quiet.

choices.label: Sit and meditate with them
choices.successText: Your spirit settles. When you open your eyes, you feel the forest around you breathe.
choices.failureText: Your mind wanders. The hermit smiles faintly and says nothing.

choices.label: Ask for guidance
choices.successText: They point at the sky, then at your chest. You understand: cultivate with an open heart.
choices.failureText: They shake their head gently. Some answers are not spoken.

choices.label: Leave quietly
choices.successText: You bow and retreat. Respect for silence is its own cultivation.
choices.failureText: You step on a twig. The hermit's eyes open briefly, then close. You leave, chastened.
